objectives: Understand how to properly season food
Practice knife skills with different cuts

steps.instruction: Gather all necessary ingredients and tools.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add chopped vegetables and sauté until tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve and enjoy your sautéed vegetables!

safety_tips: Always use a cutting board when chopping ingredients.
Be careful with sharp knives and hot surfaces.
